message.content:
@startuml
participant "NavBar" as NavBar
participant "ReduxStore" as ReduxStore
participant "UserActions" as UserActions
participant "UserReducer" as UserReducer
participant "ProfileMiddleware" as ProfileMiddleware
participant "Solid.js" as SolidJS
database "POD" as POD

NavBar -> NavBar : loadEmailRequest()
NavBar -> ReduxStore : dispatch(loadEmailRequest())
ReduxStore -> UserActions : loadEmailRequest()
destroy UserActions
UserActions -> ProfileMiddleware : loadEmailRequest()
ProfileMiddleware -> SolidJS : getEmail()
UserActions -> UserReducer : loadEmailRequest()
destroy UserReducer
UserReducer --> ReduxStore : state

SolidJS -> SolidJS : getEmail()
SolidJS --> SolidJS : email
destroy SolidJS

alt [email successfully loaded]
    ProfileMiddleware <-- SolidJS : email
    destroy SolidJS
    ReduxStore <- ProfileMiddleware : dispatch(loadEmailSuccess(email))
    ReduxStore -> UserActions : loadEmailSuccess(email)
    destroy UserActions
    UserActions -> UserReducer : updateState(email)
    UserReducer --> UserReducer : updateState(email)
    ReduxStore <-- UserReducer : updated state with email
    destroy UserReducer

else [error at loading email]
    ProfileMiddleware <-- SolidJS : error
    destroy SolidJS
    ReduxStore <- ProfileMiddleware : dispatch(loadEmailError(error))
    ReduxStore -> UserActions : loadEmailError(error)
    destroy UserActions
    UserActions -> UserReducer : updateState(error)
    UserReducer --> UserReducer : updateState(error)
    ReduxStore <-- UserReducer : updated state
    destroy UserReducer
end

destroy ProfileMiddleware

NavBar <-- ReduxStore : state

@enduml
